text:
Once upon a time, there was a curious cat that lived in a quiet cottage on a forested hilltop. Every morning, the cat would hunt worms and gnats just outside the door. After a lazy sun morning, she would return to her home to nap and dream about adventurous mice races and fantastical creatures.

One day, while she was dozing off in the sunny hedgehog hedgepipe outside her cottage, a tiny squirrel fluttered into the room. The cat batted it away playfully.

Outside, the squirrel noticed a peculiar object sticking out from beneath a bush. It was a tiny map! The squirrel scuttled over and examined it.

"Well," the squirrel said, blinking thoughtfully, "here on this map is a little cottage with a cat door. I think I once heard tell of a lady there who collects all sorts of tiny interesting things that wouldn't fit anywhere else."

The cat perked up her clawed paw. "Do you think I'd have anything
